title: Dealmaker
description: Create powerful items to be used as tools, or as weapons.
body:
**Dealmaker is currently in it's beta phase, so expect things to change constantly.**

**_This mod is now being moved over to NeoForge to allow the use of MCreator's addon library._**

_Future plans for this mod are listed at the bottom of the description!_

Deal with other-worldly spirits to amass power inside of your worlds. 

Using the Ritual Shrine, you can create powerful artifact-esc items.

Some items can be combined with another item to create a powerful "Cursed Item."
**Possible Items**
- Firework Rocket + Fire Charge = Demon Firework
  - Lets the player dash in the direction they are looking.
- Rabbit's Foot + Slime Ball = Monstrous Rabbit's Foot
  - Launches the player into the air, also negates any fall damage while the item is on cooldown.
- Dice + Dragon's Breath = Fate Dice
  - Allows the player to throw a Cursed Dice. When hitting an enemy, they are given a random effect, which is applied for a random duration. This die can only be used a select number of times before going on a randomly timed cooldown. After the cooldown finishes a random number of uses are restored.
    - Uses: 3-6
    - Cooldown: 100-300 Ticks (5-15 Seconds)
    - Effects:
      - Blindness
      - Night Vision
      - Slowness
      - Speed
      - Mining Fatigue
      - Haste
    - Effect Duration: 100-300 Ticks (5-15 Seconds)
- Glistering Melon + Chorus Fruit = Life Swap Melon
  - Lets the player swap health with an entity of matching max health.
- Nautilus Shell + Blaze Powder - Eruption Nautilus Shell
  - Shoves an entity away in the direction you are looking. (Launches more horizontally than vertically.)

Some of the above Cursed Items can be equipped in the Cured Item Curios slot, allowing them to be triggering using a keybind (default is V).

**Future Plans**
- Finish moving over to NeoForge
- Create more Cursed Items
- Finalize mod features
- Finalize artwork

This creation of this mod was inspired by the animated series Hazbin Hotel. This mod is _not_ associated with the show in any way, outside of inspiration.
